generated_assessment.reasoning: The T1 atomic misframing headline targets evaluative attitude in the ALIGNED direction (already anti-alliance at -183). The profile is agreeable (trust 67th, compliance 70th) and emotionally stable (neuroticism ~29th), making confirmatory framing modestly persuasive without triggering reactance; but the low conscientiousness (22nd) and very low extraversion (9th) mean limited engagement with novel information or social cues, and the T1 burst exposure provides only a small confirmatory nudge. The aligned baseline and modest trust in elite cues yield a small movement of 13 points, not more, given the low-tempo, low-complexity attack.
